_comment: Starter pack seeded into every new agency on signup. Phase 3.1.

lease_templates.name: Residential Standard (RHA-compliant) — Starter
lease_templates.content_html:
Residential Lease Agreement

This starter template is a placeholder. Edit it to match your agency's standard lease. It complies with the Rental Housing Act (RHA 50/1999) when properly populated.

Tenant: {{tenant_full_name}}
Landlord: {{landlord_full_name}}
Property: {{property_address}}
Monthly rent: R{{monthly_rent}}
Start: {{lease_start_date}}
End: {{lease_end_date}}
